status.description: Overall execution status of the project management task.

execution_summary.description: Summary of the actions taken, including roadmap updates and task orchestration.

sub_tasks_generated.description: List of sub-tasks created via modular-task-breakdown.

errors_and_fallbacks.description: Details of any errors intercepted and fallbacks triggered.

next_phase_readiness.description: Indicates if the project is ready to move to the next phase.
